general_inquiry.question: Find the jacobian of the vector valued function $\begin{pmatrix} f(x,y,z)\\ g(x,y,z) \\ h(x,y,z)\end{pmatrix}$ where $f(x,y,z) = x$, $g(x,y,z) = z$, and $h(x,y,z) = \tan (z)$ Do not show work just give me the final answer!!!
general_inquiry.response:
The Jacobian matrix of the vector valued function \(\begin{pmatrix} f(x,y,z)\\ g(x,y,z) \\ h(x,y,z)\end{pmatrix}\) where \(f(x,y,z) = x\), \(g(x,y,z) = z\), and \(h(x,y,z) = \tan(z)\) is:

\[
\begin{pmatrix}
1 & 0 & 0 \\
0 & 0 & 1 \\
0 & 0 & \sec^2(z)
\end{pmatrix}
\]
